items.title: Present Entro Security at IC meeting on Monday with network leverage plan
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital on Apr 17: 'I noticed several familiar names that we have close relationships with, including Morgan Stanley, Edward Jones, Cox Automotive, PNC, and Fidelity. I would like to bring this to our IC discussion next Monday.'

items.title: Follow up with Lauren at Amex for Entro Security intro
items.context: Email from itzik.alvas@entro.security on Apr 16: 'Hey Fan, also any news about Amex? I would love to meet them.' Fan replied: 'I followed up with Lauren at Amex again today for her feedback. I haven't heard back yet.'

items.title: Get term sheet status, price, and lead details from Itzik for IC prep
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital on Apr 17: 'Regarding the round, have you already signed a term sheet? If so, could you please share the latest dynamics - such as price and lead - so that I can include those details in our IC discussion as well?'

items.title: Confirm time with Barak for Opti follow-up meeting (Tue 4/21 or Wed 4/22)
items.context: Email from jackie@fin.capital on Apr 16: 'Please, let me know if anything in the below aligns - Tuesday 4/21 - 12:30 - 1:30, 2:30 - 3 (ET), Wednesday 4/22 - 1:30 - 2 (ET).' Scheduling follow-up with Opti CEO Barak Perelman.

items.title: Schedule call with Sean and Reid at LotLine to discuss round timing
items.context: Email from derek@fin.capital on Apr 17: 'Any chance you're free for a quick call today? Would love to talk through some of the timing on our end and get a better sense of where things stand with the round.'

items.title: Review Aembit's answers to diligence questions in data room
items.context: Email from kdiaz@aembit.io on Apr 16: 'I have updated the calendar invite with the new zoom details. We have also answered your most recent questions in the data room.'

items.title: Sync internally on DBGorilla after intro call and review attached deck
items.context: Email from chris@dbgorilla.com on Apr 17: 'It was great meeting you both today. Thanks again for making the time... I attached the updated deck we shared today for your convenience.'

items.title: Monitor TIAA intro progress for Echelon AI (Wayne Baker and Thompson Barro)
items.context: Email from rahul@echelonai.com on Apr 17: 'Hi Wayne & Thompson, pleasure to be connected. I'd love to find 30 minutes to share more about Echelon.' Fan made the intro to TIAA contacts.

items.title: Follow up with Matt at VanishID for the Logan product update he promised this week
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 13: 'Yep we should have an update for Logan this week.' Logan is currently trying out the VanishID product.

items.title: Follow up with Discern Security if deck/materials not received by end of week
items.context: Email from derek@fin.capital on Apr 15: 'I'd love to check in on how the round is progressing and, if you have a deck or any other materials readily available, would be grateful if you could share them.'
